name: Echo Infusion
desc_clean: Wurmkin 0 I've only just arrived and, yet, I feel as though I've spent a lifetime here.
mechanic_summary: Echo Infusion to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 0 I've only just arrived and, yet, I feel as though I've spent a lifetime here. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 0 I've only just arrived and, yet, I feel as though I've spent a lifetime here. When I sleep, I dream of Titans I've never met and Divinities creating worlds on a whim. I did not know of Exiles until they revealed themselves to me, yet now I see the very crystals that made up their Shardsouls. Am I losing my mind, or worse... am I finding it again?
